archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Dark Command Center Variant

layout_and_spacing.widget_classes: bg-[#121418] border border-[#2A2D35] rounded-none flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden
layout_and_spacing.header_strategy: Solid Background with hard bottom border for data clarity. bg-[#090A0C] border-b border-[#2A2D35] z-50 sticky top-0

surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders (The Technical Look) - border-collapse style layout, sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), no shadows. 1px solid borders.
surface_strategies.job_queue_terminal: Retro-Futurism (The Terminal Look) - Deep black bg, high-contrast monospace text, subtle 1px border.
surface_strategies.world_map_overlays: Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant) - High opacity bg-black/80 with backdrop-blur-xl and 1px border-white/10 for tooltips and floating controls over the map.

components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none), solid high-contrast backgrounds, explicit hover states (e.g. hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
components.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized. Flat, border-[#2A2D35], bg-[#090A0C], focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#0047FF]. No rounded corners.
components.tabs: Minimalist, border-b-2 indicator for active state, unstyled inactive states. Text color shifts on hover.
components.charts: Plotly for 3D/Heatmaps, Recharts for standard line/bar trends. Use the heat_scale colors for probability gradients (0.0 to 1.0).
components.sliders: Precision sliders with visible numeric input counterparts (critical for scientific tools).

icons_and_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight, strictly for data/action indication.

login_hero.description: Stunning crescent view of Earth at night. Used for Auth page background with a 60% black overlay.

abstract_data_bg.description: Abstract lines and graphs. Used for empty states, loading screens, or marketing sections.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp, instantaneous changes or very fast transitions (150ms ease-out). Changes border colors or inverts button colors.
motion_and_interactions.loading_states: Terminal-style ASCII loaders or pure CSS minimal spinners. For scientific data sweeps, a precise progress bar is mandatory.
motion_and_interactions.data_transitions: Plotly heatmaps must animate smoothly when the time-slider is dragged.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. All hover/focus states must increase contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements (calculators, sweep builders, job monitors) MUST have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'ibp-calculate-btn', 'param-sweep-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Configure Chivo and JetBrains Mono via Google Fonts.
Ensure the Dashboard uses the 'Control Room Grid' with strict 1px borders and sharp corners.
For the Interactive Results Viewer, implement Plotly for the longitude-vs-local-time heatmap.
All components MUST utilize the specific HEX codes defined in the colors section to maintain the technical, scientific aesthetic.
Ensure 'data-testid' is added to every form field, button, and key metric display.
